query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(drawTime, 10, 2) as hour,
  COUNT(*) as record_count
FROM draw_records 
WHERE drawTime LIKE '115/03/15%'
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(drawTime, 10, 2)
ORDER BY hour;

  COUNT(*) as record_count
